raw_consumer_statement: I contracted a company to help move my business move to the next level and receive funding from investors. We signed a contract to set a timeline and set payment to start the process. I paid the company {$6100.00} in total, i made the payment with my Amex. After the deadline came and the merchant wasn't showing no results or funding. I attempted to reach out but the merchant went silent. I have tried to dispute it with amex telling them I never received the services I paid for. They said they couldn't help cause the transaction posted more than 60 days ago. Since then I have filed many complaints with different agency that can help me, tXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  told me that XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX is no longer an operating company. So i simply don't know what to do.
